title: WAF Rule Generator — Virtual Patch Deployment & Provider API Integration
description: waf_generator.py generates WAF rules for AWS WAF/Cloudflare/ModSecurity/NGINX/Apache from vulnerability findings with virtual patching and lifecycle management. test_waf_generator.py validates rule generation. Gap: rules are generated and exported as JSON/strings but never deployed — no AWS WAF or Cloudflare API call is made to actually activate the virtual patch. test_api_threat_protection_engine.py clusters here.
missing: AWS WAF deployment: implement waf_deployer_aws.py using boto3 wafv2 create_rule_group() to push generated rules to the configured WAF web ACL
Cloudflare WAF deployment: implement waf_deployer_cloudflare.py using Cloudflare API v4 /zones/{id}/firewall/rules to activate virtual patches
Deployment rollback: when a deployed WAF rule causes a false-positive spike (>5% block rate on legitimate traffic), auto-rollback the rule and alert
